name: first-hit-forest-stone
description: Validate the fresh-player one-hit Forest Stone onboarding beat: break, coins, no Power reward, and fragments.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage:WaitForChild('PunchWallAutomation') local root=workspace:WaitForChild('PunchWallRPG') c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,Coins=0,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local b=root['Depth Blocks']:WaitForChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02') local before={hp=b:GetAttribute('HP'),max=b:GetAttribute('MaxHP')} local r=c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{name=b.Name}) task.wait(.25) return H:JSONEncode({before=before,result=r,broken=b:GetAttribute('Broken'),hp=b:GetAttribute('HP'),coins=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1].leaderstats.Coins.Value,power=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1].leaderstats.Power.Value,fragments=#root['Depth Physics Debris']:GetChildren()})

steps.label: first Forest Stone breaks in one punch and pays coins only
